title: RedRift
description: Modpack for RP servers or for regular players
body:
This is a modpack for RP servers, which includes mods such as EmoteCraft, PlasmoVoice and optimization mods. You can add the necessary plugins to your server and play around with this build, because it can improve your server! This build is an excellent solution for ordinary players and for players on private servers

## PlasmoVoice
A proximity voice chat mod with audio positioning and lots of features

## EmoteCraft
You can use funny emotions 

## Xaero world/minimap
Use the map to see mobs, players, and create points to make it convenient to get to the meeting place with friends!

## Optimization mods
Our modpack will run even on weak PCs and even on phones via Pojavlauncher

## Cit Resewn, ETF and EMF
These mods allow you to use CIT resourcepacks

## AlinPerspective (Analog of PerspectiveModRedux)
Use the F4 key to rotate the camera 360 from third person

## Litematica
Build buildings according to the scheme and surprise your friends!

## Ok Zoomer (analog Zoomify)
Zoom in on your screen to see buildings in the distance

## LambDynamicLights
Hold a torch in your hand to light your way

## ReplayMod
Record funny moments from the game on the servers and show it to your friends!

## Ears (analog Cosmetica)
Hang jewelry on yourself and show it to your friends

## Emotions for Emotecraft
Several emotions for the Emotecraft mod
